_comment: Apex domains where auto-expansion (走法 1) is BLOCKED. These are shared infrastructure (CDN, API gateways, generic SDK providers, analytics) — multiple unrelated companies use the same apex, so eTLD+1 identity inference would misattribute traffic. Update this file when you see misattributions in _auto_expanded.json (also possible: remove an entry from _auto_expanded.json + add its apex here + restart dpid). v5.7 will handle these via the candidate accumulator path (走法 2) with human approval instead.
